2. the 30 CCW Chronic Conditions (2017 forward; delivered as the MBSF_CHRONIC_YYYY file). 

The algorithms examine service patterns in claims data, which serve as a proxy indicating that a beneficiary is likely 
receiving treatment for the condition. A description of these files is available in the CCW Medicare Administrative Data 
User Guide on the CCW website. A listing of all the variables in the data files, along with valid values, is available on the 
CCW Data Dictionary
